name: Alpro
description: Alpro offers a Barista Oat drink, a plant-based alternative to milk that is perfect for coffee, whether frothy or flat. This oat milk is a source of fiber and vitamins B2, B12, and D, aligning with Alpro's commitment to high-quality, sustainable ingredients.

name: Califia Farms
description: Califia Farms is dedicated to providing plant-based alternatives to dairy, including a variety of oat milks. Their products are designed to perform well in various culinary applications, making it easy to incorporate oat milk into your cooking and baking.

name: OATSIDE
description: Oatside is a manufacturer of high-quality oat milk, emphasizing healthy and sustainable plant-based alternatives. Their Barista Blend oat milk offers a creamy, well-balanced taste that appeals even to those who may not typically enjoy plant milks.

name: Modern Milkman
description: The company offers a sustainable Oat Drink, highlighting its commitment to providing eco-friendly dairy alternatives. Through its collaboration with independent dairies and farmers, it ensures high-quality, plastic-free packaging for its products.

name: RISE Brewing Co.
description: RISE Brewing Co. offers a Barista Blend Oat Milk that is organic, dairy-free, and perfect for various recipes and morning beverages. Their commitment to high-quality, simple ingredients ensures a delicious and convenient option for oat milk lovers.

name: Oatbox
description: Oatbox offers a unique Barista oat beverage, specifically designed to create a silky and smooth vegan microfoam, perfect for lattes and cappuccinos. With a strong commitment to their values and community, Oatbox proudly highlights their passion for oats and their contribution to local causes.

name: Willa's Oat Milk
description: Willa's Organic Oat Milk specializes in producing innovative, plant-based oat milk made from whole, organic ingredients, emphasizing sustainability and zero food waste. Their oat milk is noted for its rich, creamy texture, lower sugar content, and higher protein and prebiotic fiber levels, making it a health-conscious choice.

name: Goodmylk
description: Goodmylk Co. offers a Super Oat Mylk Concentrate made from real food ingredients, emphasizing its delicious taste and versatility. Their oat milk is well-received by customers, highlighting its quality and the company's exceptional customer service.

name: The Oater
description: The company highlights its innovative Oater Barista machine, which produces a fresh and sustainable oat drink, emphasizing barista quality without packaging waste or added sugar. Their commitment to rethinking oat drink production suggests a focus on enhancing its quality and sustainability.

name: All Good
description: All Good is proud to be the first New Zealand food company to publish the climate footprint of its oat milk, specifically the new Good Oat Barista, which is made locally from New Zealand-grown oats. This commitment to climate transparency and local sourcing ensures a premium, sustainable oat milk option that enhances your coffee experience while supporting local growers and the environment.
